arts.sum: Although the current streak is split across the last 32 matchdays of the 2023-24 campaign and the first six of this season, Real Madrid can, however, proudly boast 38 consecutive LaLiga matches without a defeat. When can Real Madrid beat Barcelona’s LaLiga unbeaten record?

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Bundesliga defender on radar as Yoro alternative?
arts.sum: Real Madrid reportedly turn their attention to signing a Bundesliga defender having missed out on Leny Yoro during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Arsenal looking to beat Real Madrid to the signing of €45m-rated South American
arts.sum: Argentine attacking midfielder Franco Mastantuono has been linked with a move to Europe in recent months. Real Madrid are keen on signing the highly-rated attacking midfielder and they have opened talks with River Plate in order to sign the player. However, they will face competition from Premier League giants Arsenal and Manchester City, as per […] The post Arsenal looking to beat Real Madrid to the signing of €45m-rated South American appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Three observations from Real Madrid’s 4-1 win over Espanyol
arts.sum: Real Madrid have always had those sorts of players — last season, in a way, it was Joselu — and now, Endrick has become a multi dimensional version of it: In just 31 combined minutes, he has already scored two goals and won a penalty. An 18-year-old usually has problems dealing with the fact that he is at Real Madrid, and is slowly integrated into the first team, kind of like the way Arda Guler was last season (though the talent was never a problem).

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star sends message of support to Barcelona’s Marc-André ter Stegen
arts.sum: A headline member of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid has tonight sent a message of support the way of Barcelona star Marc-André ter Stegen. This, of…

arts.ttl: Match Report: Real Madrid 2-0 Athletic Club; Liga F
arts.sum: ⚪ Olga Carmona converts from the spot kick to give Las Blancas the lead over Athletic Club! Off the ball, Athletic was in a 4-4-2 for most of the time and had problems gathering into space which would leave Real Madrid space to attack.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star admits Carlo Ancelotti was ‘a little mad’ after win over Espanyol
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Rodrygo has admitted that head coach Carlo Ancelotti was not entirely satisfied in the aftermath of the club’s latest victory. Real, of course, marked their return to…

arts.ttl: Key Real Madrid pair to sit out Alavés clash
arts.sum: Two leading members of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid are expected to sit out the club’s next outing. That’s according to Blancos insider Arancha Rodríguez of…
